prompt_task: In the paired FASTQs deleterious.mutation.q1.R1.fq.gz and deleterious.mutation.q1.R2.fq.gz (exome 2×150 bp, reads from human chr9 only), there is one gene that harbors a high-confidence homozygous nonsense SNV for a gene that is highly LoF-intolerant. Report the HGNC gene symbol (uppercase) for that gene. Run the analysis inside the Galaxy environment.
